# programs.floorp

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.floorp`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --------------------------------------- | ------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `programs.floorp.configPath` | | |
| `programs.floorp.darwinAppName` | | |
| `programs.floorp.darwinDefaultsId` | `null or string` | The id for the darwin defaults in order to set policies |
| `programs.floorp.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Floorp. |
| `programs.floorp.enableGnomeExtensions` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the GNOME Shell native host connector. Note, you also need to set the NixOS option services.gnome.gnome-browser-connector.enable to true . |
| `programs.floorp.finalPackage` | `null or package (read only)` | Resulting Floorp package. |
| `programs.floorp.languagePacks` | `list of string` | The language packs to install. Available language codes can be found on the releases page: https://releases.mozilla.org/pub/firefox/releases/${version}/linux-x86_64/xpi/ , replacing ${version} with the version of Floorp you have. If the version string of your Firefox derivative diverts from the upstream version, try setting the release option. |
| `programs.floorp.name` | | |
| `programs.floorp.nativeMessagingHosts` | `list of package` | Additional packages containing native messaging hosts that should be made available to Floorp extensions. |
| `programs.floorp.package` | `null or package` | The Floorp package to use. If state version ≥ 19.09 then this should be a wrapped Floorp package. For earlier state versions it should be an unwrapped Floorp package. Set to null to disable installing Floorp. |
| `programs.floorp.pkcs11Modules` | `list of package` | Additional packages to be loaded as PKCS #11 modules in Firefox. |
| `programs.floorp.policies` | `attribute set of (JSON value)` | See list of policies . |
| `programs.floorp.profileVersion` | | |
| `programs.floorp.profiles` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Attribute set of Floorp profiles. |
| `programs.floorp.profilesPath` | | |
| `programs.floorp.release` | | |
| `programs.floorp.vendorPath` | | |
| `programs.floorp.wrappedPackageName` | | |
